_meta.source: ODM2 variablename (snake_cased) union flagged envlib extensions. The cf field is the envlib-curated (feature -> ordered CF standard_name candidates) mapping: first candidate = auto-populate default; empty list = curated 'no applicable standard name'; cf key absent (or feature key absent) = not yet curated. refresh() updates ODM2 membership only and never touches cf mappings or envlib extensions. Curation source: plans/variable_inventory.md (rulings R0-R5, decided 2026-07-06; R0 = sea_water_* names only when feature=ocean).

air_ventilation_index.rationale: No ODM2 variablename and no applicable CF standard name for ventilation index.

allocation.rationale: No ODM2 variablename for consented water allocation.

barometric_pressure.notes: air_pressure for station/instant pressure; override with air_pressure_at_mean_sea_level for MSL-reduced products.

chloride_dissolved.notes: CF has no chloride-in-water name (salinity is the ocean concept).

electrical_conductivity.notes: Ocean-only rule R0: sea_water_electrical_conductivity applies only when feature=ocean.

nitrogen_ammonia.notes: tethys migration: nitrogen_ammonia_+_ammonium merges into this variable (ruling R4). CF ammonium is mole-only.

nitrogen_nitrate.notes: CF nitrate-in-water is mole-concentration only (mol m-3); council mg/l data is not UDUNITS-convertible to it.

nitrogen_total.notes: CF dissolved-N names are mole-concentration only (mol m-3), not UDUNITS-convertible from mg/l; CF inorganic-N is not total-N.

particulate_matter_10.rationale: No ODM2 variablename for PM10 mass concentration.

particulate_matter_2.5.rationale: No ODM2 variablename for PM2.5 mass concentration.

recharge_groundwater.notes: subsurface_runoff_amount accepted as the land-model-drainage proxy (ruling R5).

runoff.rationale: No ODM2 variablename for runoff (land-model quantity).

snow_cover.rationale: No ODM2 variablename for snow-cover fraction (model/grid quantity).

snowfall.rationale: ODM2 snowDepth means snowpack depth, not snowfall accumulation; no ODM2 snowfall term. tethys migration: renamed from the misnamed snow_depth (source is WRF SNOWNC accumulated snowfall, ruling R3).

specific_humidity.rationale: No ODM2 variablename for specific humidity (model/grid quantity).

streamflow.notes: tethys migration: naturalised_streamflow also maps here, with the naturalisation carried in product_code/method.

surface_emissivity.rationale: No ODM2 variablename for surface emissivity (model/grid quantity).

temperature.notes: Freshwater bodies curate to none: CF water-body temperature exists only as sea_water_temperature (ocean-only rule R0).

velocity.notes: sea_water_speed / flood_water_speed are ocean/flood-scoped; no river velocity CF name.

water_level.notes: water_table_depth for depth-to-water datasets; override with water_surface_height_above_reference_datum for elevation datasets.

water_use.rationale: ODM2 has only sector-specific waterUse<Sector> terms; envlib uses the sector-neutral quantity.
